svg.text: Relationships and constraints
Rules developers should enforce in API, UI, and persistence layers.
State constraints
• Approved audits are immutable except through unlock workflow
• Closed audits cannot accept new tasks or findings
• Finding cannot be approved without linked criterion + evidence
• CAPA target date must be on/after finding approval date
• Unlock must create a new working version
Referential constraints
• Task.audit_id required
• Evidence must belong to an audit and usually a task
• CAPA.finding_id required
• Approval.audit_id required; decision actor required
• CSV import batch should be traceable to created tasks
Permission constraints
• Auditor sees assigned audits/tasks only
• Team Lead can review team findings and request changes
• Only approver/admin can lock or unlock approved records
• Evidence visibility follows audit scope and role
• Audit trail records every decision and lock event
